title: Cuiabá, MT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cuiabá, MT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cuiabá is a city in MT with a population of 623,614. The gateway to the Pantanal wetlands, known for its intense heat, fishing culture, and proximity to Brazil’s most incredible wildlife.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
